{"problem_standardized_math":"Suppose that the sufficient decrease condition (3.6a) is not satisfied for the step lengths $\\alpha_0$ and $\\alpha_1$. Consider the cubic polynomial that interpolates $\\phi(0)$, $\\phi'(0)$, $\\phi(\\alpha_0)$, and $\\phi(\\alpha_1)$. By sketching graphs for the two possible cases, show that the minimizer of this cubic lies in the interval $[0,\\alpha_1]$. Then show that, if $\\phi(0)<\\phi(\\alpha_1)$, the minimizer is less than $\\frac{2}{3}\\alpha_1$."}
